messages.content: You are a helpful assistant with access to tools. Use tools when appropriate to complete user tasks.
帮我做下测试，你自己随机生成10个agent的常规任务，创建10个agent并发运行，最终返回下效果数据，或者你网上找找测试的工具也可以

function.name: browser_back
function.description: Navigate back to the previous page in browser history.

function.name: browser_click
function.description: Click on an element identified by its ref ID.

function.name: browser_console
function.description: Get browser console output and JavaScript errors.

function.name: browser_get_images
function.description: Get all images on the current page with URLs and alt text.

function.name: browser_navigate
function.description: Navigate to a URL in the browser.

function.name: browser_press
function.description: Press a keyboard key.

function.name: browser_scroll
function.description: Scroll the page in a direction.

function.name: browser_snapshot
function.description: Get text-based snapshot of the page accessibility tree.

function.name: browser_type
function.description: Type text into an input field identified by ref ID.

function.name: browser_vision
function.description: Take a screenshot of the current page.

function.name: clarify
function.description: Ask the user a question when clarification is needed.

function.name: cronjob
function.description: Manage scheduled cron jobs.

function.name: delegate_task
function.description: Spawn subagents to work on tasks in isolated contexts.

function.name: execute_code
function.description: Run a Python script that can call tools programmatically.

function.name: memory
function.description: Save durable facts to persistent memory.

function.name: patch
function.description: Targeted find-and-replace edits in files.

function.name: process
function.description: Manage background processes.

function.name: read_file
function.description: Read a text file with line numbers.

function.name: search_files
function.description: Search file contents or find files by name.

function.name: session_search
function.description: Search past sessions stored in local session DB.

function.name: skill_manage
function.description: Manage skills (create, update, delete).

function.name: skill_view
function.description: Load information about specific tasks and workflows.

function.name: skills_list
function.description: List available skills (name + description).

function.name: terminal
function.description: Execute shell commands on a Linux environment.

function.name: text_to_speech
function.description: Convert text to speech audio.

function.name: todo
function.description: Manage task list for the current session.

function.name: vision_analyze
function.description: Load an image into the conversation.

function.name: write_file
function.description: Write content to a file.
